name: Ashby ATS API
what_it_does: Modern applicant tracking system with REST API for managing job postings, candidates, applications, and interviews — built for data-driven recruiting teams with advanced analytics, strong developer API, and integration with HRIS systems.
use_cases: Syncing candidate data from Ashby to HRIS via REST API on hire
Querying job posting and pipeline metrics for recruiting dashboards
Creating candidates and applications programmatically from sourcing tools
Webhook integration for real-time candidate stage change events
Automating offer letter generation triggered by Ashby stage changes
not_for: Entry-level ATS without analytics needs (use BreezyHR or JazzHR)
Job board posting without full ATS workflow
Enterprise legacy ATS requiring on-premise deployment
best_when: A high-growth company needs a modern ATS with strong analytics, developer API, and HRIS integration capabilities as a Lever or Greenhouse alternative with better data tooling.
avoid_when: You need a simple, low-cost ATS without analytics focus, or have an existing Greenhouse/Lever investment.

auth.notes: API key from organization settings. Bearer token in Authorization header. Organization-scoped access. No fine-grained OAuth2 scopes. Webhook signature verification via HMAC.

pricing.notes: Enterprise pricing — contact sales. US-based startup (YC). Rapidly growing as alternative to Greenhouse and Lever. Strong analytics and reporting differentiation. API-first approach with good developer documentation. Used by many high-growth startups.

performance.rate_limits: Rate limits per API key; documented in API reference

agent_readiness.error_message_notes: Well-documented REST API covering candidates, job postings, applications, interviews, and offers. Webhook with HMAC signing. Good developer portal. Rate limits documented. Strong integration with HRIS systems via API. API-first company culture.
agent_readiness.idempotency_notes: Candidate creation idempotent by email (deduplication). Application creation idempotent per candidate per job. Stage transitions create new events — not idempotent. Reads always idempotent.
known_agent_gotchas: Annual contract minimum — significant commitment before evaluating API quality
Enterprise pricing means API access is part of a significant contract
Candidate deduplication by email — verify dedup rules before bulk imports
Webhook payload verification required — raw body needed for HMAC check

security_score_components.security_notes: TLS enforced. SOC2 certified. GDPR compliant. API key auth. Webhook HMAC signing. Candidate PII handled with enterprise security. US data residency. Annual contract process includes security review.
